hero.title: Optimize Customer Journeys with Real-time Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Analyze, predict, and personalize customer experiences at scale. Build high-converting funnels using machine learning-driven recommendations.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to deliver tailored shopping journeys that drive conversion and customer loyalty.

f1.title: Behavior Tracking
f1.desc: Track mouse movement, clicks, and page dwell time asynchronously with minimal frontend footprint.

f2.title: Real-time Personalization
f2.desc: Dynamically restructure layouts and product sorting based on active session user heuristics.

f3.title: Predictive Analytics
f3.desc: Calculate churn risk and customer lifetime value (CLV) scores instantly using machine learning models.

f4.title: A/B Experimentation
f4.desc: Launch and measure cohort performance using robust statistical confidence testing engines.
